content.json:
# 🤖 Azure Arc Machine Intelligence Centre

## **Your Complete Single-Machine Dashboard**

**🎯 What This Does**: Get a complete 360-degree view of any Azure Arc machine in your organisation with just one click.

**✨ What You'll See:**
- **🔍 Live Performance Data** - CPU, memory, disk, and network activity
- **🚀 Why This Matters**: This dashboard shows how Azure Arc transforms any machine into a fully managed, monitored, and secured part of your cloud environment with real-time vulnerability intelligence.

---

### 📋 **Select Analysis Period**

parameters.name: TopMachineCount
parameters.label: 🔢 Top Machine Count
parameters.description: Specify the number of Machines that you want to show in the query

parameters.name: MemoryUtil
parameters.label: 💾 Memory Utilization Threshold
parameters.description: Select the average memory utilization threshold

parameters.name: CPUUtil
parameters.label: 🖥️ CPU Utilization Threshold
parameters.description: Select the average CPU utilization threshold

content.json:
## 🔥 **Fleet Hotspots - Top CPU & Memory Utilisation**

**What You're Looking At**: The highest-utilisation machines across your connected estate for the selected analysis period.

**Why This Matters**: Quickly identify the busiest machines before drilling into a single machine's detailed view. These lists highlight systems averaging more than **65%** utilisation so you can prioritise investigation and capacity planning.

content.query:
// Top {TopMachineCount} machines by average memory utilisation (>{MemoryUtil}%) using InsightsMetrics
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Origin == "vm.azm.ms"
| where Namespace == "Memory"
| extend TotalMemoryMB = todouble(todynamic(Tags)["vm.azm.ms/memorySizeMB"])
| where isnotempty(TotalMemoryMB) and TotalMemoryMB > 0
| summarize 
    AvgAvailableMB = avg(Val),
    MinAvailableMB = min(Val),
    Samples = count(),
    TotalMemoryMB = any(TotalMemoryMB)
    by Computer
| extend 
    AvgMemoryUtilization = round(100.0 * (1 - (AvgAvailableMB / TotalMemoryMB)), 1),
    PeakMemoryUtilization = round(100.0 * (1 - (MinAvailableMB / TotalMemoryMB)), 1)
| where AvgMemoryUtilization > {MemoryUtil}
| top {TopMachineCount} by AvgMemoryUtilization desc
| serialize Rank = row_number()
| extend 
    UtilizationBand = case(
        AvgMemoryUtilization >= 90, "🔴 Critical",
        AvgMemoryUtilization >= 80, "🟠 High",
        "🟡 Elevated"
    )
| project 
    Rank,
    MachineName = Computer,
    UtilizationBand,
    AvgMemoryUtilization,
    PeakMemoryUtilization,
    Samples
| order by Rank asc
content.title: 💾 Top {TopMachineCount} Machines with Memory Utilisation Above {MemoryUtil}%

content.query:
// Top {TopMachineCount} machines by average CPU utilisation (>{CPUUtil}%) using InsightsMetrics
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == "Processor" and Name == "UtilizationPercentage"
| summarize 
    AvgCPUUtilization = avg(Val),
    PeakCPUUtilization = max(Val),
    Samples = count()
    by Computer
| where AvgCPUUtilization > {CPUUtil}
| top {TopMachineCount} by AvgCPUUtilization desc
| serialize Rank = row_number()
| extend 
    UtilizationBand = case(
        AvgCPUUtilization >= 80, "🔴 Critical",
        AvgCPUUtilization >= 70, "🟠 High",
        "🟡 Elevated"
    )
| project 
    Rank,
    MachineName = Computer,
    UtilizationBand,
    AvgCPUUtilization = round(AvgCPUUtilization, 1),
    PeakCPUUtilization = round(PeakCPUUtilization, 1),
    Samples
| order by Rank asc
content.title: 🖥️ Top {TopMachineCount} Machines with CPU Utilisation Above {CPUUtil}%

content.json:
## 🔍 **Detailed Machine Performance Utilisation**

**What You're Looking At**: A detailed view of machine performance across your connected estate for the selected analysis period.

**Why This Matters**: Deep diving into a single machine's detailed view.

---

### 📋 **Select the machine**

parameters.name: SelectedMachine
parameters.label: 🖥️ Arc Machine
parameters.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| project label = name, value = name, group = resourceGroup, subscription = subscriptionId
| order by label asc

content.query:
// Performance Hero KPIs - Current Status
InsightsMetrics
| where Computer == '{SelectedMachine}'
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where (Namespace == "Processor" and Name == "UtilizationPercentage") or
        (Namespace == "Memory" and Name == "AvailableMB") or
        (Namespace == "LogicalDisk" and Name == "FreeSpacePercentage")
| summarize 
    LatestValue = avg(Val),
    SampleCount = count()
    by Namespace, Name
| extend 
    MetricName = case(
        Name == "UtilizationPercentage", "CPU Usage",
        Name == "AvailableMB", "Available Memory (MB)",
        Name == "FreeSpacePercentage", "Disk Free Space",
        Name
    ),
    Status = case(
        Name == "UtilizationPercentage" and LatestValue > 80, "🔴 High",
        Name == "UtilizationPercentage" and LatestValue > 60, "🟡 Moderate", 
        Name == "UtilizationPercentage", "🟢 Normal",
        Name == "AvailableMB" and LatestValue < 1024, "🔴 Low",
        Name == "AvailableMB" and LatestValue < 2048, "🟡 Moderate",
        Name == "AvailableMB", "🟢 Good",
        Name == "FreeSpacePercentage" and LatestValue < 10, "🔴 Critical",
        Name == "FreeSpacePercentage" and LatestValue < 20, "🟡 Low",
        Name == "FreeSpacePercentage", "🟢 Good",
        "⚪ Unknown"
    ),
    FormattedValue = case(
        Name == "UtilizationPercentage", strcat(round(LatestValue, 1), "%"),
        Name == "AvailableMB", strcat(round(LatestValue, 0), " MB"),
        Name == "FreeSpacePercentage", strcat(round(LatestValue, 1), "%"),
        tostring(round(LatestValue, 2))
    )
| project MetricName, Status, FormattedValue, SampleCount
content.title: ⚡ Real-Time Performance Metrics {TimeRange}

content.query:
// CPU Usage Trend - Historical Data
InsightsMetrics
| where Computer == '{SelectedMachine}'
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == "Processor" and Name == "UtilizationPercentage"
| summarize CPUUsage = avg(Val) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| extend 
    CPUStatus = case(
        CPUUsage > 80, "High",
        CPUUsage > 60, "Moderate",
        "Normal"
    )
| project TimeGenerated, CPUUsage, CPUStatus
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: 🖥️ CPU Usage Trend Over Time

content.query:
// Memory Usage Trend - Historical Data
InsightsMetrics
| where Computer == '{SelectedMachine}'
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == "Memory" and Name == "AvailableMB"
| summarize MemoryAvailableMB = avg(Val) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| extend 
    MemoryAvailableGB = round(MemoryAvailableMB / 1024.0, 2),
    MemoryStatus = case(
        MemoryAvailableMB < 1024, "Critical",
        MemoryAvailableMB < 2048, "Low",
        MemoryAvailableMB < 4096, "Moderate",
        "Healthy"
    )
| project TimeGenerated, MemoryAvailableGB, MemoryStatus
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: 💾 Memory Availability Trend Over Time

content.query:
// Disk IOPS Trend - Historical Data (Robust)
InsightsMetrics
| where Computer == '{SelectedMachine}'
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == "LogicalDisk"
    and Name in ("ReadsPerSecond", "WritesPerSecond")
| summarize 
    ReadsPerSec = avgif(Val, Name == "ReadsPerSecond"),
    WritesPerSec = avgif(Val, Name == "WritesPerSecond")
    by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| extend 
    ReadsPerSec = coalesce(ReadsPerSec, 0.0),
    WritesPerSec = coalesce(WritesPerSec, 0.0),
    TotalIOPS = ReadsPerSec + WritesPerSec
| extend IOPSStatus = case(
        TotalIOPS > 1000, "🔴 High",
        TotalIOPS > 500, "🟠 Moderate",
        TotalIOPS > 100, "🟡 Low",
        "🟢 Normal"
    )
| project TimeGenerated, TotalIOPS, ReadsPerSec, WritesPerSec, IOPSStatus
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: 💽 Disk IOPs Trend Over Time

content.query:
// Disk Free Space Trend - Historical Data
InsightsMetrics
| where Computer == '{SelectedMachine}'
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == "LogicalDisk" and Name == "FreeSpacePercentage"
| summarize DiskFreeSpace = avg(Val) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| extend 
    DiskStatus = case(
        DiskFreeSpace < 10, "Critical",
        DiskFreeSpace < 20, "Low",
        DiskFreeSpace < 40, "Moderate",
        "Healthy"
    )
| project TimeGenerated, DiskFreeSpace, DiskStatus
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: 💽 Disk Free Space Trend Over Time

content.json:
### 📊 **Performance Pattern Analysis**

**What These Tables Show**: The next three tables break down your machine's performance into different ranges (called 'buckets') and show you what percentage of time your machine operates in each range.

**Why This Helps**: Instead of just seeing averages, you can see the full picture - for example, if your CPU averages 50%, these tables tell you whether it's consistently at 50% or bouncing between 20% and 80%. This helps you plan for capacity and spot performance patterns.

content.query:
// Performance Distribution Analysis - CPU Usage Buckets
let CPUData = 
    InsightsMetrics
    | where Computer == '{SelectedMachine}'
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | where Namespace == "Processor" and Name == "UtilizationPercentage"
    | extend CPUUsage = round(Val, 1)
    | summarize TotalCPUSamples = count();
InsightsMetrics
| where Computer == '{SelectedMachine}'
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == "Processor" and Name == "UtilizationPercentage"
| extend CPUUsage = round(Val, 1)
| extend 
    UsageBucket = case(
        CPUUsage >= 0 and CPUUsage <= 10, "0-10%",
        CPUUsage > 10 and CPUUsage <= 20, "11-20%",
        CPUUsage > 20 and CPUUsage <= 30, "21-30%",
        CPUUsage > 30 and CPUUsage <= 40, "31-40%",
        CPUUsage > 40 and CPUUsage <= 50, "41-50%",
        CPUUsage > 50 and CPUUsage <= 60, "51-60%",
        CPUUsage > 60 and CPUUsage <= 70, "61-70%",
        CPUUsage > 70 and CPUUsage <= 80, "71-80%",
        CPUUsage > 80 and CPUUsage <= 90, "81-90%",
        CPUUsage > 90 and CPUUsage <= 100, "91-100%",
        "Other"
    ),
    BucketOrder = case(
        CPUUsage >= 0 and CPUUsage <= 10, 1,
        CPUUsage > 10 and CPUUsage <= 20, 2,
        CPUUsage > 20 and CPUUsage <= 30, 3,
        CPUUsage > 30 and CPUUsage <= 40, 4,
        CPUUsage > 40 and CPUUsage <= 50, 5,
        CPUUsage > 50 and CPUUsage <= 60, 6,
        CPUUsage > 60 and CPUUsage <= 70, 7,
        CPUUsage > 70 and CPUUsage <= 80, 8,
        CPUUsage > 80 and CPUUsage <= 90, 9,
        CPUUsage > 90 and CPUUsage <= 100, 10,
        11
    )
| summarize SampleCount = count() by UsageBucket, BucketOrder
| extend 
    TotalSamples = toint(toscalar(CPUData | project TotalCPUSamples)),
    PercentageOfTime = round(100.0 * SampleCount / toint(toscalar(CPUData | project TotalCPUSamples)), 2),
    PerformanceZone = case(
        UsageBucket in ("0-10%", "11-20%", "21-30%"), "🟢 Optimal",
        UsageBucket in ("31-40%", "41-50%", "51-60%"), "🟡 Normal",
        UsageBucket in ("61-70%", "71-80%"), "🟠 Busy",
        UsageBucket in ("81-90%", "91-100%"), "🔴 Stressed",
        "⚪ Unknown"
    )
| project 
    CPURange = UsageBucket,
    PerformanceZone,
    SampleCount,
    PercentageOfTime,
    TotalSamples,
    BucketOrder
| order by BucketOrder asc
content.title: 📊 CPU Usage Distribution Analysis

content.query:
// Performance Distribution Analysis - Memory Usage Buckets
let MemoryData = 
    InsightsMetrics
    | where Computer == '{SelectedMachine}'
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | where Namespace == "Memory" and Name == "AvailableMB"
    | extend MemoryAvailableGB = round(Val / 1024.0, 1)
    | summarize TotalMemorySamples = count();
InsightsMetrics
| where Computer == '{SelectedMachine}'
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == "Memory" and Name == "AvailableMB"
| extend MemoryAvailableGB = round(Val / 1024.0, 1)
| extend 
    MemoryBucket = case(
        MemoryAvailableGB >= 0 and MemoryAvailableGB <= 1, "0-1 GB",
        MemoryAvailableGB > 1 and MemoryAvailableGB <= 2, "1-2 GB",
        MemoryAvailableGB > 2 and MemoryAvailableGB <= 4, "2-4 GB",
        MemoryAvailableGB > 4 and MemoryAvailableGB <= 8, "4-8 GB",
        MemoryAvailableGB > 8 and MemoryAvailableGB <= 16, "8-16 GB",
        MemoryAvailableGB > 16 and MemoryAvailableGB <= 32, "16-32 GB",
        MemoryAvailableGB > 32 and MemoryAvailableGB <= 64, "32-64 GB",
        MemoryAvailableGB > 64, "64+ GB",
        "Other"
    ),
    BucketOrder = case(
        MemoryAvailableGB >= 0 and MemoryAvailableGB <= 1, 1,
        MemoryAvailableGB > 1 and MemoryAvailableGB <= 2, 2,
        MemoryAvailableGB > 2 and MemoryAvailableGB <= 4, 3,
        MemoryAvailableGB > 4 and MemoryAvailableGB <= 8, 4,
        MemoryAvailableGB > 8 and MemoryAvailableGB <= 16, 5,
        MemoryAvailableGB > 16 and MemoryAvailableGB <= 32, 6,
        MemoryAvailableGB > 32 and MemoryAvailableGB <= 64, 7,
        MemoryAvailableGB > 64, 8,
        9
    )
| summarize SampleCount = count() by MemoryBucket, BucketOrder
| extend 
    TotalSamples = toint(toscalar(MemoryData | project TotalMemorySamples)),
    PercentageOfTime = round(100.0 * SampleCount / toint(toscalar(MemoryData | project TotalMemorySamples)), 2),
    MemoryHealthZone = case(
        MemoryBucket in ("0-1 GB", "1-2 GB"), "🔴 Critical",
        MemoryBucket in ("2-4 GB"), "🟠 Low",
        MemoryBucket in ("4-8 GB", "8-16 GB"), "🟡 Moderate",
        MemoryBucket in ("16-32 GB", "32-64 GB", "64+ GB"), "🟢 Abundant",
        "⚪ Unknown"
    )
| project 
    MemoryRange = MemoryBucket,
    MemoryHealthZone,
    SampleCount,
    PercentageOfTime,
    TotalSamples,
    BucketOrder
| order by BucketOrder asc
content.title: 💾 Memory Availability Distribution Analysis

content.query:
// Performance Distribution Analysis - Disk Space Buckets
let DiskData = 
    InsightsMetrics
    | where Computer == '{SelectedMachine}'
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | where Namespace == "LogicalDisk" and Name == "FreeSpacePercentage"
    | extend DiskFreePercent = round(Val, 1)
    | summarize TotalDiskSamples = count();
InsightsMetrics
| where Computer == '{SelectedMachine}'
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == "LogicalDisk" and Name == "FreeSpacePercentage"
| extend DiskFreePercent = round(Val, 1)
| extend 
    DiskBucket = case(
        DiskFreePercent >= 0 and DiskFreePercent <= 10, "0-10%",
        DiskFreePercent > 10 and DiskFreePercent <= 20, "11-20%",
        DiskFreePercent > 20 and DiskFreePercent <= 30, "21-30%",
        DiskFreePercent > 30 and DiskFreePercent <= 40, "31-40%",
        DiskFreePercent > 40 and DiskFreePercent <= 50, "41-50%",
        DiskFreePercent > 50 and DiskFreePercent <= 60, "51-60%",
        DiskFreePercent > 60 and DiskFreePercent <= 70, "61-70%",
        DiskFreePercent > 70 and DiskFreePercent <= 80, "71-80%",
        DiskFreePercent > 80 and DiskFreePercent <= 90, "81-90%",
        DiskFreePercent > 90 and DiskFreePercent <= 100, "91-100%",
        "Other"
    ),
    BucketOrder = case(
        DiskFreePercent >= 0 and DiskFreePercent <= 10, 1,
        DiskFreePercent > 10 and DiskFreePercent <= 20, 2,
        DiskFreePercent > 20 and DiskFreePercent <= 30, 3,
        DiskFreePercent > 30 and DiskFreePercent <= 40, 4,
        DiskFreePercent > 40 and DiskFreePercent <= 50, 5,
        DiskFreePercent > 50 and DiskFreePercent <= 60, 6,
        DiskFreePercent > 60 and DiskFreePercent <= 70, 7,
        DiskFreePercent > 70 and DiskFreePercent <= 80, 8,
        DiskFreePercent > 80 and DiskFreePercent <= 90, 9,
        DiskFreePercent > 90 and DiskFreePercent <= 100, 10,
        11
    )
| summarize SampleCount = count() by DiskBucket, BucketOrder
| extend 
    TotalSamples = toint(toscalar(DiskData | project TotalDiskSamples)),
    PercentageOfTime = round(100.0 * SampleCount / toint(toscalar(DiskData | project TotalDiskSamples)), 2),
    DiskHealthZone = case(
        DiskBucket in ("0-10%", "11-20%"), "🔴 Critical",
        DiskBucket in ("21-30%", "31-40%"), "🟠 Low Space",
        DiskBucket in ("41-50%", "51-60%"), "🟡 Moderate",
        DiskBucket in ("61-70%", "71-80%", "81-90%", "91-100%"), "🟢 Healthy",
        "⚪ Unknown"
    )
| project 
    DiskFreeRange = DiskBucket,
    DiskHealthZone,
    SampleCount,
    PercentageOfTime,
    TotalSamples,
    BucketOrder
| order by BucketOrder asc
content.title: 💿 Disk Free Space Distribution Analysis
